identity.description: Turns a text brief or reference image into three fundamentally different flat website design languages with generated preview images and CSS/site guidance.

inputs.description: Website design brief and optional remote image reference.

example.direction: A website for a small ceramic lighting studio launching a new collection inspired by moonlight.
example.designDirection: Editorial, tactile, premium, with enough whitespace to feel calm.
example.unexpectedStyleHint: Playful pop-brutalist educational site with thick black outlines, sticker badges, candy accents, cream dotted paper, chunky type, and cartoon-like flat hero art.

direction.title: Text Direction
direction.default: A website for a small ceramic lighting studio launching a new collection inspired by moonlight.

designDirection.title: Design Direction
designDirection.default: Editorial, tactile, premium, with enough whitespace to feel calm.

unexpectedStyleHint.title: Unexpected Style Hint
unexpectedStyleHint.default: Playful pop-brutalist educational site with thick black outlines, sticker badges, candy accents, cream dotted paper, chunky type, and cartoon-like flat hero art.

inputs.description: Optional uploaded reference image to interpret as design direction.

outputs.description: Structured brief summary, design languages, CSS guidance, prompts, and generated image metadata.
Markdown CSS and site design handoff guidance for each concept.
Generated preview image for the restrained design direction.
Generated preview image for the direct design direction.
Generated preview image for the unexpected design direction.

skills.name: Flat Website Design Variants
skills.description: Creates Restrained, Direct, and Unexpected flat website design languages from a text brief or image reference, then generates a preview image and CSS/site guidance for each.
examples: Design a website for an AI-native garden planning app. Make it useful and calm, but push the Unexpected version into a playful pop-brutalist educational site.
Use the uploaded packaging image as visual direction for a landing page aimed at boutique retailers.
